title: LED Grow Light Controller
description: ESP32-based smart grow light controller driving WS2812B addressable LEDs configured for plant growth spectra (blue/red ratio tuning). Timer-controlled daily photoperiod; manual override; OLED displays photoperiod status and spectrum settings. WiFi MQTT integration for remote monitoring and scheduling.
objective: Programmable 16-hour photoperiod; adjustable blue (450 nm) / red (660 nm) LED ratio for seedling vs. flowering stages; MQTT-controlled schedule; OLED status display; < 30 W LED load.
constraints: 12 V / 5 A LED PSU; ESP32 DevKit; 60-LED WS2812B strip (or 2× strips for dual-channel simulation); ≤ £20 controller BOM.
supporting_fact_titles: WS2812B Addressable RGB LED — Single-Wire Protocol and Timing
MQTT Protocol for IoT Sensor Data
I²C Real-Time Clock — DS3231 Timekeeping and Alarms
NTP Time Synchronisation for Data Logging
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface
design_element_titles: NeoPixel WS2812B Addressable RGB LED Strip Controller

element_usage_notes.NeoPixel WS2812B Addressable RGB LED Str: 60-LED 5 V strip driven from GPIO 13 via 74AHCT125 level shifter; FastLED library; spectrum: blue=CRGB(0,0,255), red=CRGB(255,0,0); ratio set per growth stage via MQTT.
element_usage_notes.ESP32 WiFi + MQTT IoT Telemetry: Broker at home LAN; subscribes to growlight/cmd (on/off/schedule/spectrum); publishes growlight/status every 60 s.
element_usage_notes.DS3231 RTC Alarm Scheduling Module: I²C 0x68; two alarms: LIGHTS_ON and LIGHTS_OFF; interrupt on GPIO 34 (active LOW); RTC used as fallback when WiFi/NTP unavailable.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 128×64; line 1: LIGHTS ON/OFF; line 2: photoperiod hh:mm–hh:mm; line 3: stage (SEEDLING/VEG/FLOWER); line 4: next event countdown.
element_usage_notes.MQTT QoS-1 Secure Event Logger: Publishes on/off events with ISO timestamp to growlight/events for HA automation history.

element_interactions.data: INT falling edge on GPIO 34 at scheduled on/off times
element_interactions.description: RTC Alarm 1 fires at lights-on time; Alarm 2 at lights-off time. ESP32 ISR reads alarm flag, toggles LED strip, re-arms alarm for next day.

element_interactions.to: NeoPixel WS2812B Addressable RGB LED Strip Controller
element_interactions.data: FastLED.show() calls with per-pixel CRGB values from spectrum profile
element_interactions.description: On lights-on: fill strip with growth spectrum (blue:red ratio from MQTT setting). Seedling: 70 % blue / 30 % red. Flowering: 20 % blue / 80 % red. Brightness: 60 % (36 LEDs × 20 mA = 720 mA).

element_interactions.data: I²C framebuffer (lights_state, on_time, off_time, stage, countdown)
element_interactions.description: OLED updated every 30 s. Stage set by MQTT growlight/cmd with payload {stage:'SEEDLING'|'VEG'|'FLOWER'}.
Published at each lights-on and lights-off event; retained=false for HA automation log.
